data.summary: A sun-drenched coastal playground combining world-class surf beaches, thrilling theme parks, and a lush subtropical rainforest hinterland.

categories.title: Flights
categories.subtitle: Direct return flights from Auckland to Gold Coast

lineItems.label: Return Direct Flights
lineItems.value: Air New Zealand or Jetstar direct to OOL (~$580/person)

lineItems.label: Checked Baggage
lineItems.value: 23kg bag allowance included for all 3 passengers (~$70/person)

categories.title: Accommodation
categories.subtitle: 7 nights in a 2-bedroom apartment in Broadbeach

lineItems.label: Broadbeach Apartment
lineItems.value: Modern 2-bedroom self-contained apartment near the beach

lineItems.label: Resort Facilities
lineItems.value: Access to heated pool, BBQ areas, and secure parking

categories.title: Food & Drink
categories.subtitle: Mix of dining out, surf clubs, and self-catering

lineItems.label: Surf Club Dinners
lineItems.value: Excellent value meals at Kurrawa or Southport Surf Clubs

lineItems.label: Cafes & Lunches
lineItems.value: Acai bowls, flat whites, and beachside lunch spots

lineItems.label: Groceries & Self-Catering
lineItems.value: Breakfast supplies and snacks from Woolworths/Coles

categories.title: Sightseeing & Activities
categories.subtitle: Theme parks, wildlife, and natural attractions

lineItems.label: Theme Park Mega Pass
lineItems.value: 14-day entry to Warner Bros. Movie World, Sea World, and Wet'n'Wild

lineItems.label: Currumbin Wildlife Sanctuary
lineItems.value: Entry ticket to feed kangaroos and see koalas up close

lineItems.label: Springbrook Glow Worms
lineItems.value: Evening guided tour to natural bridge waterfall and glow caves

categories.title: Local Transport
categories.subtitle: Car rental and public transport options

lineItems.label: 8-Day Car Rental
lineItems.value: Mid-size SUV picked up and dropped off at OOL Airport

lineItems.label: Fuel & Parking
lineItems.value: Estimated fuel costs and theme park/beach parking fees

lineItems.label: G:link Light Rail
lineItems.value: Go Card fares for stress-free travel between Surfers and Broadbeach

categories.title: Extras & Contingency
categories.subtitle: Insurance, SIM cards, and emergency funds

lineItems.label: Travel Insurance
lineItems.value: Comprehensive cover for 3 NZ travelers (~$180 total)

lineItems.label: Local eSIMs
lineItems.value: 5G data plans for navigation and sharing memories (~$20/person)

lineItems.label: Contingency Fund
lineItems.value: Reserved cash for unexpected shopping, medical, or activity costs

tips: Book your Theme Park passes online in advance to skip the main queues and secure multi-day discounts.
Consider staying in Broadbeach rather than Surfers Paradise for a slightly more relaxed, family-friendly, and dining-focused atmosphere.
Get a 'Go Card' for cheap and easy public transport on the G:link light rail system.
Always swim between the red and yellow flags, as Gold Coast beaches are known for strong rips and currents.
Drive out to the hinterland (Mt Tamborine or Springbrook) for a day to experience stunning rainforest walks and cooler temperatures.
data.visaInfo: New Zealand citizens traveling on a valid NZ passport are generally granted a Special Category Visa (subclass 444) automatically upon arrival in Australia, provided they meet basic character and health requirements.
data.bestTimeToVisit: May to October is ideal. These months offer comfortable, warm daily temperatures (20-25°C), lower humidity, and the least rainfall, making it perfect for both theme parks and beach activities.
